textEn: When the sky has split [open]
And has listened [i.e., responded] to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]
textTranslit: Wa azinat li Rabbihaa wa huqqat

textEn: And when the earth has been extended
And has cast out that within it and relinquished [it].
textTranslit: Wa alqat maa feehaa wa takhallat

textEn: And has listened [i.e., responded] to its Lord and was obligated [to do so] -
textTranslit: Wa azinat li Rabbihaa wa huqqat

textAr: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدْحًا فَمُلَـٰقِيهِ
textEn: O mankind, indeed you are laboring toward your Lord with [great] exertion and will meet it.
textTranslit: Yaaa ayyuhal insaanu innaka kaadihun ilaa Rabbika kad han famulaaqeeh

textEn: Then as for he who is given his record in his right hand,
textTranslit: Fa ammaa man ootiya kitaabahoo biyameenih

textEn: He will be judged with an easy account
And return to his people in happiness.

textAr: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهْرِهِۦ
textEn: But as for he who is given his record behind his back,
textTranslit: Wa ammaa man ootiya kitaabahoo waraaa'a zahrih

textEn: He will cry out for destruction
And [enter to] burn in a Blaze.
Indeed, he had [once] been among his people in happiness;
Indeed, he had thought he would never return [to Allāh].

textAr: بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرًا
textEn: But yes! Indeed, his Lord was ever, of him, Seeing.
textTranslit: Balaaa inna Rabbahoo kaana bihee baseeraa

textEn: So I swear by the twilight glow
And [by] the night and what it envelops
And [by] the moon when it becomes full
[That] you will surely embark upon [i.e., experience] state after state.
So what is [the matter] with them [that] they do not believe,

textAr: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ لَا يَسْجُدُونَ ۩
textEn: And when the Qur’ān is recited to them, they do not prostrate [to Allāh]?
textTranslit: Wa izaa quri'a 'alaihimul Quraanu laa yasjudoon

textEn: But those who have disbelieved deny,
And Allāh is most knowing of what they keep within themselves.
So give them tidings of a painful punishment,

textAr: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۭ
textEn: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds. For them is a reward uninterrupted.
textTranslit: Illal lazeena aamanoo wa 'amilus saalihaati lahum ajrun ghairu mamnoon
